<!-- Thank you for contributing! -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (requires major version bump)
- [ ] Documentation only

## Checklist

- [ ] `terraform fmt -recursive` passes
- [ ] `terraform validate` passes in root and `examples/*`
- [ ] `terraform test` passes
- [ ] `tflint --recursive` passes
- [ ] README is regenerated via `terraform-docs` (or CI will do it)
- [ ] Added/updated `examples/` if user-facing
- [ ] Added `moved {}` blocks for any resource renames
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry (if applicable)
